EmailTemplate.name: Not Contactable Call Email VDNB
EmailTemplate.subject: Unable to Contact with you
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Valued Customer,
Greetings of the day from Runwal!!!
We hope this email finds you well.
We recently attempted to reach you via phone regarding your visit to {Project Name}, but unfortunately, we were unable to connect.
Your feedback and engagement are incredibly important to us, and we want to ensure that we address any questions or concerns you may have.
Please feel free to contact us at your earliest convenience by calling us back at {SM Contact Number}.
Looking forward to reconnecting soon.
Warm regards, {SM Name} {SM Contact Number}
.
